"[31] [Notification] [CHP]-[29] R/O OF SV 14 BLK INFO QX60 PLT/9UEY751 IS LL AND LOOKING FOR HIS VEH // ADVSD RP VEH WAS TOWED DUE TO THIS 20002 LOG // RP ADVSD HE PARKED HIS VEH IFO HIS GIRLFRIENDS HOUSE ON MICHIGAN/ROWAN LAST NIGHT AND HE WAS NOT THE DRIVER OF THIS 20002 // RP ADVSD VEH WAS GONE WHEN HE CAME OUT THIS MORNING AND VEH WAS POSS STOLEN BY THE DRIVER INVLD IN THIS 20002 // RP IS CURRENTLY 97 AT THE ELA CHP OFC AND INQUIRING IF AN OFCR CAN MEET W/ HIM SO HE CAN FILE RPT OR IF OFCRS CAN GIVE HIM A CALL // NAME AND 1021 IN SUPPLEMENTAL INFO [Shared]"
